title: Structures, Unions, Tagged Variants, and Flexible Arrays
description: A packet queue combines headers and payloads while a changed variant exposes padding, inactive-union, and size-formula errors. Learners cumulatively produce tagged packet representation through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Initialize, copy, compare, and validate structures by members and invariants rather than raw-byte assumptions.
Pair a union with an explicit discriminant and access only the active, validated member.
Allocate flexible-array objects with checked header-plus-elements arithmetic and record their element count.
